violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Taco shells, bowls and chips were found uncovered in pans in the kitchen. Food items should be protected from contamination.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of microwave was found dirty. Microwave should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Chlorine solution in the dish machine was found at 0ppm during inspection. Chlorine solutions should be maintained at 50ppm for sanitizing food contact surfaces.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Hand washing sink in the kitchen was found leaking on the floor when used. Water was also draining very slowly into the pipes after use. Plumbing system should be properly maintained.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
